title: atropis pseudomaritima
intro: Atropis pseudomaritima, also known as sea angelica or sea angelica root, is a type of plant that belongs to the carrot family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Atropis pseudomaritima include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Atropis pseudomaritima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
